John Doe

DevOps & Infrastructure Engineer

About | Skills | Projects | Contact

System Overview

I specialize in automating cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and container orchestration. My goal is to bridge the gap between development and operations through Infrastructure as Code (IaC).

Tech Stack

  • Cloud: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud
  • Containers: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm
  • CI/CD: Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI
  • IaC: Terraform, Ansible, CloudFormation
  • Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack

Active Deployments

1. Multi-Region Kubernetes Cluster

Deployed a highly available K8s cluster across AWS regions using Terraform and EKS.

Tools: Terraform, AWS, Kubernetes

2. Automated Security Scanning Pipeline

Integrated SonarQube and Snyk into a Jenkins pipeline to automate vulnerability reports.

Tools: Jenkins, SonarQube, Docker
